title.description: The title at the top of the page

description.message: Markaad shiddo kordhintan, weydiimaha aad ku qorto barta raadinta ee Safari waxaa loo diri doonaa ChatGPT Search, taasoo ka dhigaysa ChatGPT Search mashiinkaaga raadinta ee caadiga ah ee Safari. Siyaasadaha isla sida aad u isticmaasho ChatGPT ayaa khuseeya.
description.description: The message shown on the extension's popup

learn_more.message: Wax dheeraad ah halkan ka baro.
learn_more.description: The text for the learn more link

extension_description.message: Isticmaal raadinta ChatGPT si toos ah uga tooska ah barta Safari.
extension_description.description: The description of what the extension does
